must_detect.matched_text: Parties: Daehan Circuitry Co., Ltd. (KRX KOSDAQ issuer) and Solbaram Partners SPC propose a strategic financing via non-voting convertible preferred shares.

Retention/Minimisation: Diligence‑related personal data will be retained for up to three years from closing or earlier erasure where legally permissible; collection is limited to what is necessary for FSC/FSS‑supervised reporting.

Parties: Daehan Circuitry Co., Ltd. (KRX KOSDAQ issuer) and Solbaram Partners SPC propose a strategic financing via non-voting convertible preferred shares.
Use of Proceeds: General working capital and domestic R&D; no proceeds allocated to share buybacks absent a separate board resolution.
Public Disclosure/MNPI: Issuer confirms all important information per the FSCMA has been publicly disclosed on DART; no MNPI will be provided in diligence absent formal wall‑crossing and clean‑team procedures.
Regulatory: Filing of material facts and investor‑relations notices on KRX to be completed prior to signing; no objection or comment from the FSC/FSS is anticipated based on prior consultations.
Confidentiality: A mutual NDA will govern diligence; clean‑team access only to aggregated financials and anonymised operational metrics.
Data Processing Addendum: A DPA is attached as Schedule DP‑1; “personal information” is defined in accordance with PIPA, and special identification information will be handled with heightened controls.
Onboarding/KYC Forms: Investor onboarding forms request minimal data fields; Resident Registration Number fields are disabled and display the placeholder 000000-0000000, with masking applied to any legacy records.
Cross‑Border Transfer (positive): Data Export Approval DEA‑26‑041 covers transfer of limited employee contact data (work name, role title, work email) to the processor “Mokpo Cloud Analytics KK” in Japan under company standard contractual safeguards and DPA Schedule DP‑2, effective 2026‑03‑01.
Consent Withdrawal: If a data subject withdraws consent, processing ceases and erasure is executed per the retention matrix; there are no pending withdrawals as of the date of this term sheet.
DSAR Handling: Data subject access requests will be accepted via privacy.office@daehancircuitry.example and fulfilled within statutory timelines; no open DSARs are noted in the compliance memo.
Retention/Minimisation: Diligence‑related personal data will be retained for up to three years from closing or earlier erasure where legally permissible; collection is limited to what is necessary for FSC/FSS‑supervised reporting.
Employment Data Scope: Secondment onboarding for integration planning will collect only role descriptors and work contact details; payroll numbers, bank account information, and resident‑number images are excluded from the data room.
Conditions Precedent: Completion of DPA schedules, delivery of the privacy compliance memo CP‑IR‑2026, confirmation of KRX notices, and receipt of customary board approvals.
Negative Clarification: This term sheet does not authorise any immediate deletion, transfer, or disclosure of MNPI; references to erasure, cross‑border transfer, and resident‑numb
